name: Tinta Academy V2
tagline: Video-based wine education platform with Mux streaming and progress tracking
description: The second iteration of Tinta Academy's wine education platform, featuring video courses hosted on Mux with chapter-based progress tracking. Teachers create courses with drag-and-drop chapter ordering, upload videos and attachments, and view sales analytics. Students browse, purchase, and complete courses with real-time progress indicators and completion celebrations.
highlights: Video course streaming with Mux for hosting and transcoding
Drag-and-drop chapter reordering with persistent positioning
Student progress tracking with per-chapter completion
Teacher analytics dashboard with revenue and sales charts
File uploads via UploadThing and image hosting on Cloudinary
